acceptance_targets: [ch10_dialogue_001] Pass if Anika's revised exchange at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:51 includes at least one contraction and one concrete reference to the specific pain entry or leg consequence, and avoids parallel motto phrasing; fail if the key line still reads as an aphoristic slogan.

[ch10_dialogue_002] Pass if an unattributed single line from Tess (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:29) is clearly distinguishable from an unattributed single line from Nadia (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:37) by diction and rhythm alone; fail if both still read as interchangeable policy boilerplate.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if Anika's revised exchange at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:51 includes at least one contraction and one concrete reference to the specific pain entry or leg consequence, and avoids parallel motto phrasing; fail if the key line still reads as an aphoristic slogan.
findings.evidence: Anika's resistance line lands as polished slogan syntax: "I report it straight, I heal it straight" (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:51), adjacent to similarly formal framing at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:49.
findings.problem: Register drift: in this pressure beat, Anika's voice skews rhetorically tidy and older than her established high-contraction, concrete, 11-year-old stress speech pattern.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast Anika's lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:49 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:51 into more immediate, age-credible spoken rhythm (contractions, interruption, concrete leg/app reference) while retaining defiance.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if an unattributed single line from Tess (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:29) is clearly distinguishable from an unattributed single line from Nadia (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:37) by diction and rhythm alone; fail if both still read as interchangeable policy boilerplate.
findings.evidence: Tess and Nadia both default to similarly compressed policy diction (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:29 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:37), reducing idiolect separation in authority speech.
findings.problem: Two nonfamily authority voices become partially interchangeable in syntax/rhythm at peak bureaucratic pressure, muting scene-level vocal contrast.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep Tess clinically evidence-first at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:29, but revise Nadia's lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:37 with queue-floor texture (hesitation, colloquial framing, role-limited frustration) to differentiate cadence.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on dialogue realism and voice separation: idiolect fidelity, leverage shifts, pressure cadence, anti-transcript behavior, natural colloquial texture (contractions/interruptions/slang when character-true), and pressure-true profanity usage per aesthetic risk policy.
revision_pass.label: dialogue/idiolect/cadence fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
